scripts.deploy: next build && touch out/.nojekyll && cd out && git init -b gh-pages -q && git config http.postBuffer 524288000 && git add -A && git -c user.email='zhongrenfei1@users.noreply.github.com' -c user.name='zhongrenfei1-hub' commit -m 'deploy' -q && git remote add origin https://github.com/zhongrenfei1-hub/lineup-studio.git 2>/dev/null; git push -f origin gh-pages && cd .. && rm -rf out/.git
